implementation_notes: index.html uses <script type="module"> for ES module loading; relative imports resolve in same /js/ directory after integration.
main.js handles MissingTokenError mapping per UI message contract even though api-client doesn't throw it (defensive coverage if api-client behavior changes).
window error handler surfaces a hint about local-server requirement if file:// blocks module loading.
Enter key on either input triggers runLookup; click on #lookup-button triggers same.
No @media queries in CSS — desktop-first per OOS.mobile.
No external font fetches — system-ui font stack only.
